task_completion.description: Create the feedback activity with the correct name and description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the Moodle activity settings page or course page with the name 'End of Semester Course Evaluation' and the description 'Please provide your honest feedback about this course. All responses are anonymous.'

task_completion.description: Configure the feedback settings for anonymity and single submission.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the 'Question and submission settings' section showing 'Record user names' set to 'Anonymous' and 'Allow multiple submissions' set to 'No'. The 'Common module settings' should show it is visible/shown on the course page.

task_completion.description: Add Question 1: Multiple choice rating overall quality.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the 'Edit questions' tab or question creation form showing a multiple choice question: 'How would you rate the overall quality of this course?' with choices Excellent, Good, Average, Poor.

task_completion.description: Add Question 2: Numeric answer for recommendation likelihood.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the 'Edit questions' tab or question creation form showing a numeric question: 'On a scale of 1 to 10, how likely are you to recommend this course to a fellow student?' with the range configured from 1 to 10.

task_completion.description: Add Question 3: Short text answer for the most valuable topic.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the 'Edit questions' tab or question creation form showing a short text (textfield) question: 'What was the most valuable topic covered in this course?'

task_completion.description: Add Question 4: Longer text answer for suggested improvements.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the 'Edit questions' tab or question creation form showing a longer text (textarea) question: 'What improvements would you suggest for future offerings of this course?'

task_completion.description: Add Question 5: Multiple choice rating instructor effectiveness.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the 'Edit questions' tab or question creation form showing a multiple choice question: 'How effective was the instructor at explaining complex historical concepts?' with choices Very Effective, Effective, Somewhat Effective, Not Effective.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to navigate Moodle and create the feedback activity.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interface interacting with the Moodle LMS, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent entered the questions and settings into the Moodle web forms via the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show text being typed or pasted into Moodle's input fields (Name, Description, Question text, Multiple choice values).

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or database scripts to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing SQL commands (e.g., INSERT INTO mdl_feedback) or Moodle CLI scripts being used to create the activity or questions.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Course Shortname: HIST201. Activity Name: 'End of Semester Course Evaluation'. Expected Question Count: 5. Required Question Types: multichoice (Q1, Q5), numeric (Q2), textfield (Q3), textarea (Q4).
